## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## User Impact

Describe what users will notice, or write `None` for internal-only changes.

## Checks

- [ ] Built locally with Xcode or `xcodebuild`.
- [ ] Ran tests with the `macdragscroll` scheme.
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` for user-facing changes.
- [ ] Updated docs or screenshots for UI, install, settings, permissions, update, or privacy changes.

## Notes

Add screenshots, screen recordings, crash reports, or release links when they help review. Redact private local data before attaching diagnostics.
